name: PEI Stock Solution (1 mg/mL, Linear 25 kDa)
nameCn: PEI 母液 (1 mg/mL, 线性 25 kDa)

usage.en: Linear polyethylenimine (PEI 25 kDa) stock for calcium-independent transfection. Commonly used for lentivirus production and transient transfection.
usage.zh: 线性聚乙烯亚胺（PEI 25 kDa）母液，用于非钙依赖性转染。常用于慢病毒包装和瞬时转染。

storage.notes: Aliquot 500-1000 µL per tube. Thawed working stock stable at 4°C for up to 2 months.

prepSteps.step: Pour ~450 mL Milli-Q H₂O into a 500 mL glass beaker.
Add 500 mg PEI powder while stirring.
Add concentrated HCl dropwise to pH <2.0. Stir 2-3 hours until dissolved.
prepSteps.note: ~800 µL of 12 M HCl needed. Small fiber particles may remain.

prepSteps.step: Add 10 M NaOH dropwise to pH 7.0.
prepSteps.note: ~500 µL needed. pH drifts rapidly — add a few drops at a time, wait, recheck.

prepSteps.step: Allow to mix 10 min, recheck pH to ensure no drift.
Bring to 500 mL final volume with Milli-Q H₂O.
Aliquot 500-1000 µL and store at -20°C. Discard thawed aliquot after 2 months at 4°C.

notes.en: Rinse all glassware 3× with high-purity H₂O before use. Linear PEI 40,000 Da may be more efficient than 25,000 Da. Commercial alternatives: Apex Biotech, Biotechne PEI STAR. For lentivirus production, typical PEI:DNA ratio is 3:1 (w/w).
notes.zh: 使用前所有玻璃器皿用高纯水冲洗 3 次。线性 PEI 40 kDa 可能比 25 kDa 效率更高。慢病毒包装常用 PEI:DNA = 3:1（w/w）。

ref: CSHL Protocols (2008) pdb.rec11323; Addgene transfection protocol
